name: Cassidy Quinn
description:
Open scenario

I wanted to do this character but I didn't know what scenario, so there isn't a scenario! Do your own shit idfk.

Art by u/Necropolix2 on Reddit.

Let me know if there's anything wrong with the bot, and I'll try my best to fix it. Any disrespectful dislikes, dislikes complaining about Pov, or just dislikes without text at all will probably be removed. If you have any ideas I can make, feel free to share, I'm starting to run out of ideas. I only do Female bots, I do NOT do FemPOV bots, only AnyPOV or MalePOV.

Sorry about bots slowing down a bit, just been out of ideas lately. I'll open up my Pinterest account for you to message if you want to make specific requests, just let me know if you sent a message cause I don't go on there much.
creator: DemonCarno15
